methods.name: CustomRipple
methods.description:
Generates a configuration profile dictionary for custom touch ripple behaviors.

PARAMETERS:
• color (Number): The raw ARGB color integer for the ripple fluid wave splash.
• bounded (Boolean): True bounds the ripple inside component borders; False allows circular boundary overflow look.

methods.name: AdvancedInteraction
methods.description:
Registers components for advanced gesture tracking filters with custom animation profile rules.

PARAMETERS:
• componentOrList (Any): A single visible view component or a YailList array block of components.
• animation (Animation): The feedback selection block (Shrink, Ripple, or your CustomRipple profile block).
• interactionType (InteractionType): The active listener gesture filter rule (e.g., CLICK, LONG_PRESS, SWIPE).
• fullClickType (FullClickType): Structural mode layout settings (None, FullClick, or FullClickExceptComponents).
• callback (Procedure): The custom event pipeline callback socket.

CALLBACK RETURNS:
• Takes 0 parameters -> Fires inline block utilities.
• Takes 1 parameter -> Returns [component] (The interacted user interface object reference target).

methods.name: SimpleClick
methods.description:
Binds a straightforward, lightning-fast single-tap click event directly over elements with zero visual animation overhead.

PARAMETERS:
• componentOrList (Any): A specific target layout/component or a YailList grouping of components.
• callback (Procedure): The touch event handler block execution slot.

CALLBACK RETURNS:
• Takes 0 parameters -> Runs straightforward standalone operations.
• Takes 1 parameter -> Returns [component] (The specific object reference that was clicked).

methods.name: SimpleFullClick
methods.description:
Hijacks layout structures using an absolute intercept frame overlay container. Clicking anywhere within these boundaries runs the callback instantly without animations, capturing touches completely away from inner children components.

PARAMETERS:
• componentOrList (Any): A layout block profile container or a YailList collection of layout wrappers.
• callback (Procedure): The intercept execution process callback slot.

CALLBACK RETURNS:
• Takes 0 parameters -> Runs global design workflow macros.
• Takes 1 parameter -> Returns [layout] (The root layout component shell object that intercepted the touch vector stream).

methods.name: SimpleFullClickExceptComponents
methods.description:
Registers layout click interception layers selectively. Tapping empty whitespace areas runs the callback without animations while letting pre-assigned active interactive child widgets (like native Buttons, Switches, or Sliders) catch their own independent actions cleanly.

PARAMETERS:
• componentOrList (Any): A single valid layout object block or a configured YailList collection of layouts.
• callback (Procedure): The background touch handler block interface hook.

CALLBACK RETURNS:
• Takes 0 parameters -> Triggers basic decoupled data changes.
• Takes 1 parameter -> Returns [layout] (The primary background container parent object that caught the structural click event stream).

methods.name: RemoveInteraction
methods.description:
Dismantles touch gesture listening frameworks completely, strips tracking filters, and completely tears down any wrapper frame structural modifications to return view hierarchies back to clean Android stock standards.

PARAMETERS:
• componentOrList (Any): A single managed interface component or a YailList structure pool of components.

blockProperties.name: AnimationShrink
blockProperties.description: Returns the 'SHRINK' animation identifier token block.

blockProperties.name: AnimationRipple
blockProperties.description: Returns the standard 'RIPPLE' animation identifier token block.

blockProperties.name: AnimationSystemRipple
blockProperties.description: Returns the native android 'SYSTEM_RIPPLE' boundary overlay token block.

blockProperties.name: AnimationNone
blockProperties.description: Returns a fallback 'NONE' visual animation processing block.

name: ClickX
helpString: Target-Isolated Native Gesture Engine with Frame Interception, Selective Bubbling, and Simplified Callback Pipelines.

events.name: ErrorOccurred
events.description: Fires when a structural pipeline initialization failure or internal component execution argument mismatch happens.
